originalSummary: Leaked "DarkSword" exploits published to GitHub allow hackers and cybercriminals to target iPhone users running old versions of iOS with spyware, according to cybersecurity researchers.

summary:

  编辑 | 袁斯来
  硬氪获悉，情绪陪伴场景小型具身机器人公司「青心意创」已于近期完成Pre-A轮融资，本轮融资由厚雪资本和天际资本领投，老股东乐朴资本持续跟投，新辉资本担任长期财务顾问。本轮融资将主要用于超小型双足陪伴机器人的产品研发及技术平台搭建、核心算法迭代与团队扩充。此前，公司已完成由初心资本、乐朴资本及多位科技领

title: 英国广播公司调查后从TikTok中删除的性化黑人女性的人工智能视频
originalTitle: AI videos of sexualised black women removed from TikTok after BBC investigation
summary: BBC发现，数十个Instagram和TikTok帐户使用人工智能头像来推广露骨的内容。
originalSummary: Dozens of Instagram and TikTok accounts have used AI avatars to promote explicit content, the BBC finds.

title: Hargreaves Lansdown表示，影响数千人的IT问题已经结束
originalTitle: Hargreaves Lansdown says IT issues which affected thousands are over
summary: 这家金融公司已为其网站和应用程序中断道歉，这激怒了许多客户。
originalSummary: The finance firm has apologised for the disruption to its website and app, which has angered many customers.

title: 卢克·利特勒（ Luke Littler ）申请商标以打击人工智能假货
originalTitle: Luke Littler applies to trademark his face to combat AI fakes
summary: 这位飞镖明星的形象已被合法地用于飞镖商品、零食和时尚品牌。
originalSummary: The darts star's image has been used legally on darts merchandise, snacks and fashion brands.

title: 出版商因人工智能索赔而取消恐怖小说的发行
originalTitle: Publisher cancels horror novel's release over AI claims
summary: 作家米娅·巴拉德（ Mia Ballard ）否认自己在写恐怖故事《害羞的女孩》（ Shy Girl ）
originalSummary: Author Mia Ballard denies having used AI herself when writing the horror story Shy Girl.

title: 研究表明，虚假的在线帖子加油自我诊断
originalTitle: False online posts fuel self-diagnosis, says study
summary: 诺福克和萨福克的研究人员表示，关于自闭症和多动症的虚假信息最令人担忧。
originalSummary: Norfolk and Suffolk researchers say the false information about autism and ADHD is most worrying.
